templates.purpose: Capture persistence in medium-horizon trend signals with lower churn than fast breakout systems.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter when fast and slow return windows align, trend slope is positive, and volatility remains below the crowding cap.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on trend break, risk-off regime change, or momentum decay below threshold.
templates.stop_logic_structure: ATR-normalized stop with slower trailing logic than breakout templates.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Use volatility-scaled size and cap exposure when trend age becomes extended.

templates.purpose: Trade own-return trend only when volatility-normalized momentum remains positive enough to pay for stress exits.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter with aligned 20/60-bar returns, positive trend slope, and realized volatility below the candidate's volatility cap.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit when the slow return flips, volatility jumps above cap, or rolling Sharpe falls below the momentum floor.
templates.stop_logic_structure: ATR stop plus volatility kill-switch; avoid widening the stop just because realized volatility has jumped.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Scale exposure inversely to recent realized volatility and cap gross exposure during high-volatility drawdowns.

templates.purpose: Rank beta-adjusted residual momentum so the candidate is less dependent on broad market continuation.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter long when residual 20/60-bar returns are positive, market beta is estimated, and idiosyncratic volatility remains below the candidate cap.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit when residual return flips, market beta shock dominates the symbol, or realized volatility breaches the de-risk threshold.
templates.stop_logic_structure: ATR stop plus residual-momentum decay stop; do not average down residual losers.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Scale by residual-momentum rank and penalize high idiosyncratic volatility.

templates.purpose: Generate momentum candidates that can explicitly stand down during market-drawdown / fast-rebound crash windows.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter trend only when 20/60-bar momentum is positive and the market-drawdown plus market-rebound crash score is below the candidate threshold.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit or halve exposure when market rebound accelerates out of a drawdown or momentum-volatility crosses the crash-risk cap.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Hard symbol stop plus sleeve-level crash kill-switch based on market drawdown/rebound state.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Use inverse volatility sizing and multiply exposure by the crash-aware risk-on fraction.

templates.purpose: Rank relative-strength winners that also sit in lower-volatility / lower-beta cohorts.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter top relative-strength names only when realized-volatility rank, beta rank, drawdown rank and liquidity score pass the candidate filter.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Rebalance when relative-strength rank falls or volatility/beta rank migrates into the fragile cohort.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Portfolio-level drawdown cap plus symbol volatility migration stop.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Weight by relative-strength rank divided by realized-volatility rank; keep sector/basket concentration low.

templates.purpose: Separate continuation after a survived event gap from raw gap chasing.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter only when event gap strength is large, gap_survival remains true after the first post-event bar, post-event volume confirms, and realized volatility is not in stress.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on gap-midpoint loss, relative-strength break, volume confirmation failure, or the drift timeout.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Stop just beyond the failed-gap threshold; skip if the first tradable open already violates that threshold.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Start with small event-risk size and only scale if gap survival plus relative strength persist.

templates.purpose: Promote continuation candidates whose price is near a one-year high and still supported by medium-horizon relative strength.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter long only when price is within the 52-week-high distance band, 20/60-bar returns are positive, and relative strength is top-ranked.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit when price loses the anchor band, relative strength rank breaks, or medium trend rolls over.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Initial stop under the most recent swing low; trail only after a fresh high is printed.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Use smaller size when distance to the anchor is too tight after a vertical extension.

templates.purpose: Follow liquid post-earnings winners while the drift window remains open.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter after large earnings surprise gap if relative strength and post-event volume remain supportive on day one.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on gap fill, drift decay, or predefined holding window expiration.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Stop below post-event support or prior day low.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Use smaller size immediately after gap day and add only if trend structure remains orderly.

templates.purpose: Fade temporary overreaction where short-horizon flow outruns the broader regime.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter contra move after one-day or five-day stretch reaches threshold and liquidity remains sufficient.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit at partial mean reversion target, VWAP reset, or timeout.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Hard stop if extension re-accelerates in the original direction.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Keep size small because this strategy trades against local trend pressure.

templates.purpose: Exploit temporary spread dislocations in stable relative-value pairs.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter when pair spread exceeds z-score threshold while common-factor alignment and liquidity remain healthy.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit when spread normalizes or holding window expires.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Stop if spread keeps widening and structural divergence is confirmed.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Size pair legs by beta balance and liquidity, not headline conviction.

templates.purpose: Rank and rotate into cheaper high-quality names instead of treating value and quality separately.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Select top-ranked basket by blended value-quality score with profitability and investment discipline filters.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Rebalance on cadence or exit when composite rank falls below threshold.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Portfolio-level risk budget and sector cap replace tight single-name stops.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Weight by rank while penalizing crowding and turnover.

templates.purpose: Favor low-beta, shallower-drawdown baskets when the market is paying too much for high-octane upside.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Select lower-beta basket when beta dispersion is wide and sector balance remains acceptable.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Rebalance on cadence or exit when risk-on regime strongly reasserts itself.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Use portfolio drawdown and exposure caps rather than tight tactical stops.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Size to volatility parity and keep concentration low.

templates.purpose: Tilt allocation toward recently winning factors and strategy families while the persistence window remains intact.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Increase weight on families whose factor return rank and dispersion remain supportive across the latest rebalance window.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Reduce overlay when factor leadership flips or crowding breaches cap.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Overlay only; it cannot override hard execution or portfolio risk boundaries.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Keep overlay weight capped and secondary to base signal quality.

templates.purpose: Capture crypto carry when funding and basis remain supportive without obvious stress compression.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter when carry score is positive, basis confirms, and funding is not yet at squeeze levels.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit when carry decays, basis compresses, or market stress spikes.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Use stress-trigger exit and leverage cap before directional stop logic.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Size off carry quality and sharply reduce exposure under risk-off pressure.

templates.purpose: Follow crypto trend only when moderate funding/basis confirmation improves the quality of the directional move.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter with positive return momentum, supportive funding/basis, and funding z-score inside the non-squeeze confirmation band.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on trend decay, basis compression, funding z-score squeeze, or realized-volatility stress.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Use directional ATR stop plus immediate de-risk when funding flips against the trade.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Scale down as funding z-score approaches crowding cap; do not let carry confirmation increase leverage by itself.

templates.purpose: Fade large altcoin spread shocks versus a Bitcoin anchor after a volatility and liquidity screen.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter the lagged reversion leg when spread z-score is extreme, relative-strength shock is not news-confirmed, and realized volatility remains below stress cap.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit at spread z-score normalization, volatility shock, or short timeout.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Stop if the spread keeps widening or Bitcoin anchor regime transitions into a high-volatility breakout.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Keep market-beta small and reduce size when the alt leg has inferior liquidity.

templates.purpose: Follow short attention-driven continuation bursts in liquid crypto names while crowding remains contained.
templates.entry_logic_structure: Enter when attention shock, relative strength, and volume expansion align before funding fully catches up.
templates.exit_logic_structure: Exit on attention decay, loss of relative strength, or adverse funding acceleration.
templates.stop_logic_structure: Tight stop because attention-led bursts can reverse quickly.
templates.sizing_logic_hints: Use smaller size than systematic trend or carry strategies.
